title: People Nearby (Proximity-Based User Discovery)
description: Opt-in feature allowing users to discover other users and groups within a configurable geographic radius. Visibility is entirely voluntary and requires explicit activation per session. No passive location tracking. Designed with k-anonymity and differential privacy to prevent pinpointing exact user locations.

threats: Trilateration attack: adversary queries from multiple known positions to derive exact location of victim.
Stalking: malicious user repeatedly queries to track victim's movements over time.
Profile enumeration: bulk-harvest user profiles near high-traffic locations.
Correlation with external data: cross-referencing platform profiles with physical presence.
mitigations: Location stored as geohash precision 6 (±610m cells) — never exact coordinates.
Fuzzing: add random offset ±0 to ±300m (Gaussian, σ=100m) before geohash encoding on write.
Results return approximate distance band only ('within 100m / 500m / 1km / 5km') — not exact distance.
Anti-trilateration: distances are quantized to 5 bands; resolving to < 50m accuracy requires > 10,000 distinct vantage points (computationally infeasible given rate limits).
Rate limit: max 1 refresh per 30 seconds per user_id (Redis token bucket).
Session-scoped: location shared only while user is actively in 'People Nearby' screen. Background sharing prohibited.
Visibility TTL: if user closes screen without explicit 'Stop Sharing', server auto-expires visibility after 15 minutes.
No history stored: only current position vector, not trajectory.

data_model.storage: Redis Sorted Set with GEO commands (GEOADD, GEORADIUS)
data_model.ttl_per_member: 900 seconds (15 min) — refreshed on each location update
data_model.no_postgres_writes: Proximity data never persisted to PostgreSQL. Redis-only.

start_sharing.server_action: Fuzz coordinates, encode to geohash-6, GEOADD to Redis set with TTL

stop_sharing.server_action: ZREM user from all nearby Redis sets immediately

groups_nearby.description: Group admins can optionally make their group visible in People Nearby by sharing a static location.
groups_nearby.moderation: Groups flagged by trust & safety can be excluded from nearby results via blocklist.

ui.entry: Contacts tab → 'Find People Nearby' — requires explicit tap, no passive activation
ui.screen: Map + list view with distance bands. Refresh button (rate-limited). 'Stop Sharing' always prominent.
ui.onboarding: Full-screen consent prompt with privacy explanation before first activation.
